qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.desc: Ungaprinta futhi unamathisele le khodi ye-QR entweni. Ukuqapha kwayo kuya ngqo kuleli khasi.

form.name: Igama lento
form.location_help: Kuphi ekamelweni? (isib. 'Ishelufu ephezulu yesiqandisi esiluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka')
form.location_empty: Akukavunyelwa indawo kuleli kamelo okwamanje. Qala ukubhala ukuze udale eyodwa.

login.title: Ngena
login.subtitle: Phatha yonke impahla yasekhaya yakho ngokuhlakanipha
login.terms_title: 📋 Imigomo Yokusebenzisa kanye Nesaziso Sokungathathi Nxaxheba
login.terms_beta: Uhlobo Lwe-BETA: I-HomeInventory okwamanje isesigabeni sokuhlola. Akukho siqinisekiso esinikezwa mayelana nokuhlala noma ukuphepha kwedatha yakho.
login.terms_disclaimer: Isaziso Sokungathathi Nxaxheba: Ngokusebenzisa lolu hlelo, uyavuma ukuthi awukwazi ukufuna noma yikuphi ukukhokhelwa ngenxa yokulahleka kwedatha okungenzeka, izinkinga zokufinyelela, noma eminye imiphumela yezobuchwepheshe.
login.terms_backup: Ukugcinwa Kwedatha: Siyoncoma kakhulu ukuthi ugcine ikhophi yolwazi lwakho olubalulekile njalo.
login.terms_accept: Ngokungena, kubhekwa ukuthi uyavuma le migomo.

register.title: Siyakwamukela ku-HomeInventory
register.subtitle: Dala i-akhawunti entsha noma ujoyine indlu ekhona
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Kuzodalwa indlu entsha futhi uzothola Isitshalo SeNdlu esiyingqayizivele. Yabelana ngaleli kiyi nomndeni ukuze nifinyelele kufa le-inventory efanayo.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Faka Isitshalo SeNdlu esabelwe kuwe ukuze ujoyine indlu ekhona. Wonke umuntu onekiyi angafinyelela ku-inventory ehlanganyelwe.
register.house_key_placeholder: Namathisela ukhiye wekhaya onobude bezinhlamvu ezingama-64
register.terms: Imigomo Yokusebenzisa kanye Nesimemezelo Sokungabi Necala
register.password_length: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe nezinhlamvu okungenani ezi-6
register.key_required: Ukhiye Wasekhaya uyadingeka ukujoyina indlu esivele ikhona

key_created.title: 🎉 Indlu Idaliwe!
key_created.subtitle: Londoloza ukhiye ongezansi endaweni ephephile
key_created.warning: Okuqakathekile: Lo khiye uzovezwa kanye kuphela. Wabelane ngawo namalungu omndeni ukuze bakwazi ukufinyelela izinto ezifanayo.

email_verification.title: 📧 Ukuqinisekisa I-imeyili Kuyadingeka
email_verification.message: I-akhawunti idaliwe! Sicela uqinisekise ikheli lakho le-imeyili ukuze ungene.
email_verification.step_2: Chofoza kwi-<1>"Qinisekisa I-Akhawunti Yami"</1> inkinobho ekwi-imeyili.
email_verification.spam_note: Hlola ifolda ye-spam/junk uma i-imeyili ingafiki.
email_verification.key_note: Kubalulekile: Ukhiye wakho wendlu nawo uthunyelwe kwi-imeyili. Ungawabelana ngawo namalungu omndeni.

forgot_password.title: Ukhohlwe Iphasiwedi
forgot_password.subtitle: Qala indlela ephephile yokululama ukuze ufinyelele ku-akhawunti yakho futhi.
forgot_password.email_success: Uma i-akhawunti ikhona, isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi esivumelekile imizuzu engu-15 sithunyelwe.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: I-imeyili ivaliwe kule server. Qhubeka usebenzisa Ukhiye Wokululama owagcina ngesikhathi usetha i-akhawunti.

reset_password.title: Setha Kabusha Iphasiwedi
reset_password.subtitle: Sebenzisa isixhumanisi esiphephile ukusetha iphasiwedi entsha.
reset_password.missing_token: Isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi sibonakala singaphelele noma siphukile.

recovery_setup.title: Dala Ukhiye Wokubuyisela
recovery_setup.subtitle: Kuze kube lokhu kuqediwe, i-akhawunti yakho ayibhekwa iphephile ukuze kuphinde kusebenze iphasiwedi yendawo.
recovery_setup.warning: Lo mhlahlandlela uzokhonjiswa kanye kuphela. Gwema ukuyigcina kumphathi wephasiwedi noma kwenye indawo ephephile ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
recovery_setup.description: Njengoba i-imeyili ivaliwe, uzokwazi kuphela ukusetha kabusha iphasiwedi yakho ngale kiyu ngokuzayo.

recovery_key_modal.subtitle: Lo kiyu liboniswa kanye kuphela.
recovery_key_modal.warning: Uma ulahlekelwa yilokhu kiyu ngesikhathi i-imeyili ivaliwe, ungase ungakwazi ukubuyisela iphasiwedi yakho. Kokuphinda futhi uyigcine ngokuphepha.

auth.password_requirements: Sebenzisa okungenani {{min}} izimpawu ezinkulu, ezincane, izinombolo, kanye nezimpawu.

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: I-HomeInventory okwamanje isesigabeni sokuhlola neshashalazi. Akukho siqinisekiso esinikeziwe sokungapheli kwedatha noma ukuphepha. Sicela ugcine amakhophi alondolozekayo nolwazi olubalulekile.

messages.connection_error: Akukwazi ukuxhuma kuseva. Hlola uxhumano lwakho lwe-inthanethi.
messages.username_len_error: Igama lomsebenzisi kumele libe okungenani izinhlamvu ezingu-3
messages.password_min_len: Iphasiwedi entsha kumele ibe nezincwadi ezingaphezu kweziyisithupha okungenani

my_houses.title: Izindlu zami
my_houses.info: 💡 Ungaba yilungu lezindlu eziningi futhi ushintshe phakathi kwazo. Indlu ngayinye igcina impahla yayo ngendlela ehlukile.

house_info.title: Ukhiye Wasekhaya Osebenzayo
house_info.share_info: 💡 Abasebenzisi owabelana nabo ngalo khiyi bangakwazi ukufinyelela impahla yakho ngokusebenzisa inketho ethi "Joyina Indlu" ngesikhathi sokubhalisa.
house_info.invite_desc: Yabelana ngukhiye wakho wendlu ukuze amalungu omndeni akwazi ukufinyelela impahla efanayo. Ilungu ngalinye lingena ngemvume nge-akhawunti yalo kodwa lifinyelela idatha efanayo.

security.title: Ezokuphepha
security.recovery_key_desc: Ungakha ukhiye omusha wokubuyisela iphasiwedi yasekhaya.
security.recovery_key_missing: Akukabonakali kuwukhiye wokubuyisela kulesi akhawunti okwamanje.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: Ukhiye wamanje wokubuyisela awukwazi ukuboniswa. Wubuyisele uma kudingeka.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Qinisekisa iphasiwedi yakho yamanje ukuze uqhubeke. Ukhiye omusha uzovezwa kanye kuphela.

join_house.title: Joyina Indlu
join_house.key_help: Faka ukhiye owamukele kumalungu omndeni wakho

create_house.title: Dala Indlu Entsha
create_house.name_placeholder: isb. Indlu Yehlobo, Ihhovisi, Isitolo Sokugcina
create_house.name_help: Uma kushiywe kungagcwalisiwe, izobizwa nge-'Indlu Yami Entsha'
create_house.info: ℹ️ Izigaba nemibhede ezenzakalelayo zizodalwa ngokwendlu entsha. Ungazihlela kamuva.

username.title: Shintsha Igama Lomsebenzisi
username.help: Izimpawu eziyi-3-30, izincwadi, izinombolo, underscore kanye nedashi kuphela

inventory.title: Impahla
inventory.subtitle: {{count}} izinto zitholakale
inventory.delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le nto?

categories.title: Izigaba
categories.subtitle: {{count}} izigaba
categories.delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le khathalogi?

rooms.title: Amakamelo
rooms.subtitle: {{count}} amakamelo
rooms.delete_confirm: Uqinisile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli gumbi?

users.confirm_delete_2: ⚠️ ISIXWAYISO: Lokhu KUZOSUSA NGOKUPHELELE ONKE amasimu (izinqolobane, amagumbi, izigaba) zomsebenzisi "{{username}}"!
users.confirm_delete_3: 🚨 ISIXWAYISO SOKUQEDA: I-akhawunti "{{username}}" nazo zonke idatha zizokususwa NGOKUNGABUYISELI. Uyafuna ukuqhubeka?

hero.description: Yenza izinto zakho zasendlini zibe ngebhuku ledijithali. Hlukanisa izinto, mema umndeni, bese ufinyelela kuwena noma kuphi. Esimanje, ephephile, futhi kulula ukuyisebenzisa.

features.title: Kungani <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: Zonke izici zokwenza ukuphatha ikhaya kube lula endaweni eyodwa

categorize.title: Hlukanisa Izinto
categorize.desc: Hlela zonke izinto ngokwekamelo nangokwezigaba, uthole okudingayo ngemizuzwana.

family.title: Mema Umndeni usebenzisa Ukhiye Wezindlu
family.desc: Mema amalungu omndeni ngokhiye wakho wendlu oyingqayizivele, phatha izinto ndawonye.

access.title: Ukufinyelela Noma Kuphi
access.desc: Ekhaya, emsebenzini, noma ekuvakasheni - finyelela ngokuphepha ezintweni zakho noma kuphi.

barcode.title: Engeza Ngokushesha Nge-Barcode
barcode.desc: Skana amabarcode wemikhiqizo, imininingwane izogcwaliswa ngokuzenzakalayo.

security.title: Kuphephile Futhi Kuyimfihlo
security.desc: Idatha yakho iyafihliwe futhi ivikelwe ngesisekelo esihambisana ne-KVKK.

backup.title: Backup & Thumela Ngokuyikhipha
backup.desc: Yenza backup yezinto zakho ngefomethi ye-JSON, buyisela noma nini lapho ufuna.

cta_bottom.title: Qala Ukusebenzisa Manje!
cta_bottom.description: Dala i-akhawunti yamahhala bese waguqula izinto zekhaya zakho zibe zenombolo. Ukubhalisa kuthatha nje imizuzwana embalwa.

footer.desc: Ipulatifomu elula nevikelekile yokuguqula izinto zakho zekhaya zibe zenombolo.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Umbono wedeshiba: akukho idatha yomsebenzisi yangempela eboniswa.

inventory.title: Uhlu
inventory.content: Lapha ungangeza futhi uhluze izinto zakho. Landela zonke izinto zasekhaya endaweni eyodwa!

house_key.title: Ukhiye Wasekhaya
house_key.content: Lona ukhiye wakho wasekhaya, uwusebenzise ukumema abanye. Faka amalungu omndeni endlini yakho!

categories.title: Izigaba
categories.content: Hlela ngokubeka izinto zakho ezikhathini ezihlukene. Ugesi, ifenisha, ikhishi, nokunye okuningi!

google_house_select.title: Siyakwamukela!
google_house_select.subtitle: Ungi+ngenile usebenzisa i-Google. Manje khetha indlu.
google_house_select.house_name_hint: Uma lishiywe lingagcwalisiwe, lizobizwa ngokuthi "Ikhaya Lami"
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Faka ukhiye wezenzakalo eziyi-64 ezitholakele kumqondisi womndeni

scanner.title: Iskena leBarcode
scanner.permission_error: Imvume yekhamera yinqatshelwe. Hlola izilungiselelo zesiphequluli.
scanner.busy_error: Ikhamera imatasa. Vala ezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza.
scanner.found_local_msg: Le barcode isivele ikhona esitokweni sakho.
scanner.zoom_hint: 💡 Khulisa isikhulisi ukuze ubonakale kahle futhi ubambe ucingo uzinzile
scanner.invalid_qr: Le khodi ye-QR ayenzelwe lolu hlelo lokusebenza.
scanner.not_found: Umkhiqizo awutholakali. Zama ikhodi ye-bar ehlukile.

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Hlola le khodi ye-QR ngocingo lwakho ukuze ufinyelele into ngokushesha
item_qr.usage_desc: Phrinta ikhodi ye-QR uyinamandele entweni. Hlola ngocingo lwakho ukuze ufinyelele kuleli khasi ngokushesha!

no_house.title: Awuxhunyiwe ekhaya njengamanje
no_house.description: Dala ikhaya elisha noma uthumele isicelo sokuhlanganyela kwelinye elikhona.

create.title: Dala Ikhaya Elisha
create.description: Qala uhlu lwakho lwezinto zasekhaya bese uqhubeka ngokushesha.
create.name_placeholder: isb. Ikhaya Lami, Indlu Yasemini, Isitoreji

join.title: Thumela Isicelo Sokuhlanganyela
join.description: Faka ukhiye wendlu bese uthumela isicelo ngqo kumnikazi wendlu.

welcome.houseKeyNote: Lona ukhiye wakho wasekhaya, uwusebenzise ukumema abanye. Faka amalungu omndeni endlini yakho!
features: 💡 Ungaba yilungu lezindlu eziningi futhi ushintshe phakathi kwazo. Indlu ngayinye igcina impahla yayo ngendlela ehlukile.

houseKick.subject: Ilungu lisusiwe endlini
houseKick.bodyLine2: Dala ikhaya elisha noma uthumele isicelo sokuhlanganyela kwelinye elikhona.

passwordReset.intro: Qala indlela ephephile yokululama ukuze ufinyelele ku-akhawunti yakho futhi.
passwordReset.warningBody: Uma i-akhawunti ikhona, isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi esivumelekile imizuzu engu-15 sithunyelwe.
